n_sessions_early: Number of class sessions attended in early period
total_dur_early: Total time spent in class during early sessions (minutes)
mean_dur_early: Average session duration in early period (minutes)
n_code_early: Total code-related actions (save + submit) in early sessions
n_active_early: Active learning actions (code submit + quiz) in early sessions
n_help_early: Help-seeking actions (raise hand + AI tutor + chat) in early sessions
n_total_events_early: Total number of all actions in early sessions
n_codesubmit_early: Number of code submissions for grading in early sessions
n_quiz_early: Number of quiz attempts in early sessions
n_raisehand_early: Number of times student raised hand in early sessions
attend_frac_early: Fraction of expected early sessions actually attended (0–1)
code_step_ratio_early: Ratio of code actions to slide navigation (higher = more coding)
active_frac_early: Fraction of all actions that are active learning (code/quiz)
events_per_session_early: Average total actions per session (engagement intensity)
action_diversity_early: Number of distinct action types used (breadth of engagement)
